title: Fix channel creation error and add server joining features

requirements.text: Fix the actor.createChannel is not a function error that is preventing channel creation in the current version. Ensure the createChannel method exists in the backend actor and is properly exported.

quotes: I cant create a channel now because of the error
The error is in this version, not the previous one

acceptanceCriteria: Users can successfully create channels without encountering the actor.createChannel error
The createChannel method is defined in backend/main.mo and properly exposed
Channel creation functionality works through the CreateChannelForm component

requirements.text: Add a server browser view that displays all available public servers that users can browse and join. Include server name, member count, and description in the listings.

quotes: Both, but people can actually join servers
You want both server browsing AND join via invite code joining functionality

acceptanceCriteria: Users can view a list of all available servers
Each server listing shows its name, member count, and description
Users can click to join any server from the browse view
The server browser is accessible from the servers page navigation

requirements.text: Enhance the existing join server dialog to support both invite code entry and direct server selection from the browse view. Ensure users can successfully join servers through both methods.

quotes: Both, but people can actually join servers
browse available servers AND join via invite code options

acceptanceCriteria: Users can join servers by entering an invite code
Users can join servers by selecting from the browse list
Both joining methods properly add the user to the server
Success feedback is shown after joining
The newly joined server appears in the user's server list

requirements.text: Add backend support for listing all public servers with their metadata including name, description, member count, and creation date.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend exposes a method to list all public servers
Server listings include name, description, member count, and creation date
Only non-banned users can view the server list
Server list query is properly integrated with frontend hooks

requirements.text: Improve message composer UX by adding visual feedback for mentions, improving attachment preview layouts, and enhancing the send button state to show when content is ready to send.
acceptanceCriteria: Mentions show visual styling as users type
Attachment previews display in a clean, organized layout
Send button is disabled when there is no content to send
Send button shows loading state during message submission

requirements.text: Add online status indicators for users in the members list and channel timeline to show who is currently active.
acceptanceCriteria: Users show a green indicator when they have been active recently
Status indicators appear in the members management panel
Status indicators appear next to user avatars in the message timeline

requirements.text: Enhance server cards in the server list with visual previews including server icon, member count badges, and online member indicators.
acceptanceCriteria: Server cards display server icons prominently
Member count is shown with an icon badge
Online member count is displayed separately
Server cards have hover effects for better interactivity

constraints: Maintain the single-actor backend architecture in backend/main.mo
Do not modify read-only frontend paths including useInternetIdentity hooks, useActor.ts, main.tsx, and components/ui directory
Preserve existing Internet Identity authentication flow
Keep all server data and state management within the main backend actor
nonGoals: Real-time WebSocket features for live updates
External authentication providers beyond Internet Identity
